g.text: - instead of answering the user’s question directly,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - the model first steps back and asks a more general, higher-level question,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - then uses that broader view to answer the original question.
